title: Senior Accountant, Japanese Speaking
description:
Job Description:

  • Perform monthly closing for JERAGM and consolidation process to ensure accurate and timely group and statutory reporting
  • Perform monthly reconciliations between accounting profit and loss against Middle Office profit and loss. Identify and evaluate discrepancies for necessary adjustments
  • Manage quarterly consolidation under JERATI and group reporting to the main shareholder in Japan
  • Prepare consolidation packs and ensure proper translation of relevant schedules for submission to JERA
  • Oversee accounting and reporting for key holding and operating entities: JERA Trading International (JERATI) (Singapore), JERA Global Markets Holdings (HoldCo) (United Kingdom), JERAGM Services (Japan) and liaising with its accounting team for the monthly reporting, JERAGM Netherlands
  • Support JERAGM Japan with monthly reporting coordination
  • Act as the liaison between JERAGM Group and JERA for reporting, consolidation and any other queries
  • Work closely with the auditors for JERA Group Audit and manage audits for JERATI and HoldCo
  • Coordinate with JERAGM internal teams, JERA teams and external service provider (Japanese IT vendor and accounting professionals in Japan)
  • Identify and make improvements to process and internal controls
  • Support Financial Controller/Financial Reporting Manager on ad-hoc duties as assigned
  • Be knowledgeable of and ensure compliance with trading standards and other compliance requirements
  • Collaborate with other professionals and lead to support overall Finance goals and objectives


Requirements:

  • Bachelor’s Degree in Accountancy or equivalent professional degree
  • At least 3 years of relevant experience in Finance and Accounting, or a related role within the Japanese fuel markets or utilities companies is required, as the candidate needs to understand the complexities of this industry as well as the relevant regulatory, operational, and commercial dynamics.
  • Japanese language proficiency (JLPT N1) or similar is required as this role requires to act as a liaison between Japanese stakeholders, both at working and management levels
  • Experience liaising with Japanese utility companies including JERA is required
  • Solid technical accounting background is preferred, ideally with exposure to derivative accounting in the commodity trading business
  • Experience with Sun, Horizon and DIVA (consolidated accounting system) is an advantage
  • Good IT and spreadsheet skills
  • Able to work independently with minimal supervision, demonstrating strong initiative and accountability
  • Able to manage multiple priorities and work well under time pressure
  • Self-starter and fast learner
  • Hands-on, analytical, strong attention to details and conscientious
  • Collaborative team player with good verbal and written communication skills in English, able to work effectively with people at all levels.

postedCompany.description:
JERA Global Markets (JERAGM) is a leading utility-backed seaborne energy trader specialising in LNG, Coal and Freight with a platform to trade across all key markets (North America, Europe, Middle East, Africa and Asia). JERAGM is a joint venture between majority shareholder JERA Inc. (JERA) and EDF Trading.

JERAGM operates one of the largest seaborne energy portfolios in the world which gives us an in-depth understanding of the way local, regional and international energy markets behave. These insights enable us to help our customers increase security of supply, optimise their portfolios and improve the risk management of their assets.

JERAGM LNG team manages the flexibility of over 35 million tonnes of supply each year, with structural access to both the European and North American gas markets. The coal team manages 60 million tonnes of supply each year for its shareholders and third-party customers and operates a major coal terminal in the Netherlands.

The commercial hub of the company is in Singapore, with offices located in Japan (Tokyo), the UK (London) and the US (Baltimore).
postedCompany.name: JERA GLOBAL MARKETS PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
